zh.Ormesby St Margaret, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特
zh.Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特
zh.Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可格亞特 亞爾姆斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Moulton於大約1563年出生在英國諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特時，他的父親John Moulton57歲，母親Thomazine26歲。他於1584年6月14日與Anne Taylor在英國諾福爾可姆斯比結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1637年9月20日之後在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特。

zh-hans.Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可格亞特 亞爾姆斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Moulton于大约1563年出生在英国諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特时，他的父亲John Moulton57岁，母亲Thomazine26岁。他于1584年6月14日与Anne Taylor在英国諾福爾可姆斯比结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1637年9月20日之后在他的家乡，埋葬在英国諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特。

nameMeanings.name: Moulton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Cheshire and Lancashire): habitational name from one or more of the places called Moulton (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, North Yorkshire), most of which are named with the Old English personal name Mūl(a), the Old Norse personal name Múli, or Old English mūl ‘mule’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Molden
meanings: metronymic from the Middle English female personal name Mold, a form of Maud, with the characteristically West Midland genitival suffix -en.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When John Moulton was born about 1563, in Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England, his father, John Moulton, was 57 and his mother, Thomazine, was 26. He married Anne Taylor on 14 June 1584, in Hemsby, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died after 20 September 1637, in his hometown, and was buried in Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Moulton est né environ 1563, à Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, John Moulton, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Thomazine, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Anne Taylor le 14 juin 1584, à Hemsby, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé après 20 septembre 1637, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Moulton um 1563 in Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Moulton 57 und seine Mutter Thomazine 26. Er hat am 14. Juni 1584 in Hemsby, Norfolk, England Anne Taylor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb nach 20. September 1637 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Moulton è nato il circa 1563 nel Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, John Moulton, aveva 57 anni e il suo madre, Thomazine, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Anne Taylor il 14 giugno 1584, nel Hemsby, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì dopo il 20 settembre 1637, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England.

ja.Hemsby, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクヘムスビー
ja.Martham, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクマーサム
ja.Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクオルメスビー サイント マーガレット
ja.Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクグレアト ヤーモウス
ja.lifeSummary: John Moultonが約1563年にイギリスノーフォルクオルメスビー サイント マーガレットで生まれた時，父John Moultonは57歳，母Thomazineは26歳であった。1584年6月14日にイギリスノーフォルクヘムスビーでAnne Taylorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1637年9月20日以後に故郷で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクオルメスビー サイント マーガレットにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Moulton(이)가 대략 1563년 영국 노르폴크 오메스비 세인트 마거릿에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Moulton(은)는 57세였고, 그의 어머니 Thomazine(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1584년 6월 14일 영국 노르폴크 헤스비에서 Anne Taylor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1637년 9월 20일 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 오메스비 세인트 마거릿에 묻혔다.

mn.about 1563–after 20 September 1637: ойролцоогоор 1563 он–1637 оны Есдүгээр сарын 20–наас хойш

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Moulton nasceu aproximadamente 1563, em Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Moulton, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Thomazine, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Taylor em 14 de junho de 1584, em Hemsby, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu após 20 de setembro de 1637, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Moulton родился около 1563 г. в местности ормесби сеинт маргарет, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Moulton было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Thomazine, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Taylor 14 июня 1584 г. в местности хемсби, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер после 20 сентябрь 1637 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности ормесби сеинт маргарет, норфолк, Англия.

sm.about 1563–after 20 September 1637: e tusa o le 1563–ina ua ma'ea le 20 Setema 1637

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Moulton nació aproximadamente 1563, en Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Moulton, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Thomazine, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Anne Taylor el 14 de junio de 1584, en Hemsby, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió después de 20 de septiembre de 1637, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
